positive: A symmetrical, minimalist circular composition featuring a whimsical arrangement of cosmic flora and fauna. The main elements are stylized deep-space lily pads, glowing nebula clusters, and stylized crescent moons, rendered in a continuous line art style with clean, solid color fills. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, glowing teal, luminous gold, and contrasting cream white. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for apparel repeat or single print. Vector-like aesthetic, strong contrast, perfect symmetry, high resolution, flat graphic design, intricate pattern, clean lines, sticker style, no gradients or photorealism.
